name: vertex-ai-proxy-cloud-function
description: GCP Cloud Function for Vertex AI Proxy (Alternative to Anthropic)

scripts.deploy: gcloud functions deploy vertexAIProxy --runtime nodejs18 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --set-env-vars GCP_PROJECT_ID=gen-lang-client-0895465231,GCP_LOCATION=us-central1,VERTEX_MODEL=gemini-1.5-pro --project gen-lang-client-0895465231 --region europe-west1
scripts.deploy-anthropic: gcloud functions deploy claudeProxy --runtime nodejs18 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --set-env-vars ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY --project gen-lang-client-0895465231 --region europe-west1
